mandates.mandate: The story file is always the source of truth. Derived views are regenerated from story files.
Illegal status transitions return FAIL treated as gate failure.
All updates are atomic: if any derived view update fails, revert the story file change.
Never silently skip a status update.

step.title: Receive inputs
step.action: Receive: story_path, new_status, optional sprint_status_path, optional story_index_path.

step.title: Read current state
step.action: Read story file at story_path. Extract current status.
If story file does not exist: return FAIL.

step.title: Validate transition
step.action: Check transition from current_status to new_status against allowed-transitions.
If not allowed: return FAIL with details.

step.title: Apply updates atomically
step.action: Update story file status and updated_at timestamp.
If sprint_status_path provided: update derived view.
If story_index_path provided: update derived view.
If any derived view fails: revert story file. Return FAIL.

step.title: Return result
step.action: Return PASS with story_path, old_status, new_status, files_modified.
